hypothesis: If a diffusion model framework combining an equivariant graph neural network backbone with an energy-based denoising approach and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo refinement is applied to amorphous material generation, then it will produce structurally valid amorphous configurations with radial distribution functions, bond angle distributions, and structure factors that closely match reference molecular dynamics simulations, because incorporating physical energy gradients and stochastic sampling into the reverse diffusion process enforces chemically realistic local geometries that purely data-driven score matching alone cannot guarantee.
